GST-Compliant · Live Dashboard · Instant Invoicing

Smart Pharmacy
Billing Made Simple

MedNex is a complete Pharmacy Management & GST Billing System — from inventory and purchases to sales, invoicing, and real-time analytics. All in one place.

🚀 Open Dashboard Explore Features ↓
100%
GST Compliant
A4 PDF
Instant Invoices
Live
Dashboard Charts
Multi
Payment Modes

Everything You Need

Built for Modern Pharmacies

From a small medical shop to a multi-outlet pharmacy chain — MedNex handles it all with speed and accuracy.

🧾
GST Sales Billing
Generate CGST/SGST/IGST compliant invoices in seconds. Supports Walk-in and registered customer billing with batch tracking.
📦
Purchase Management
Track supplier purchases with batch, expiry, MRP, PTR rate management. Supports multiple payment modes and auto-stock updates.
🏪
Smart Inventory
Real-time stock tracking with low stock alerts, expiry warnings, and reorder level monitoring. Never run out of critical medicines.
📊
Live Dashboard
Today's sales, purchases, profit, stock value — all live. Monthly charts showing Sales vs Purchase vs Profit trends.
🖨️
Printable A4 Invoices
Professional A4 landscape invoice with GST summary, bank details, terms & conditions, and signature section. Print or save as PDF.
👥
Customer & Supplier CRM
Manage customer & supplier profiles with GSTIN, DL number, credit limits, and payment history. Full ledger support.
📋
Reports & Analytics
Detailed sales and purchase reports with date filters. Export to Excel. View profit trends and category-wise analysis.
💊
Medicine Master
Complete medicine catalogue with HSN codes, GST slabs, generic names, rack management, and company-wise categorisation.
🔐
Role-Based Access
Admin, Pharmacist, and Cashier roles with granular permission control. Secure JWT authentication with session management.

Simple & Fast

Up and Running in Minutes

MedNex is designed to be intuitive — no training required. Your pharmacist can start billing from day one.

1
Setup Company
Add your pharmacy details, GSTIN, bank info, and drug license number from Settings.
2
Add Medicines
Import your medicine catalogue with HSN codes, GST slabs, and batch-wise pricing.
3
Record Purchases
Enter supplier invoices — batches, expiry, MRP, PTR — and stock updates automatically.
4
Start Billing
Select customer, add medicines, apply discounts, and print a GST invoice in under 60 seconds.

VAYUNEX
S O L U T I O N
Product-led engineering firm · Chandigarh Tricity, India
Building & scaling enterprise SaaS products

VayuNex Solution is not your typical IT agency. We're a product-led engineering firm based in the Chandigarh Tricity region, building and scaling our own suite of SaaS products while delivering custom software for industry partners. MedNex is one of our flagship healthcare solutions.

💻
Software & Web Development
Full-stack web apps, e-commerce platforms, ERPs, and custom business software with modern tech stacks.
🤖
AI Solutions
AI-powered workflows, chatbots, VayuNex Assist (lead qualification & scheduling), and custom AI CRM integrations.
📈
Growth & Marketing
SEO, Google & Meta Ads, content marketing, and growth consulting to scale your digital presence.
🏗️
Virtual CTO
Technical strategy, architecture decisions, and implementation leadership for growing startups and businesses.
👔
Recruitment Services
End-to-end tech recruitment and staffing solutions — from sourcing to onboarding the right talent.
🏥
Healthcare Tech
Specialized healthcare clinic lead engines, patient CRM management, and appointment automation systems.

Trusted by Pharmacies

What Our Users Say

Owner, Shree Medical Store, Ahmedabad

"The live dashboard shows me today's profit at a glance. Expiry alerts have saved us from huge losses. Excellent system."

"Purchase management with batch tracking is brilliant. Stock updates automatically and reports are very detailed."
